mapper.select: SELECT ua.id, ua.user_no, ua.nickname, ua.avatar_url, ua.mobile, ua.gender, ua.status, ua.register_source, ua.invitation_code_used, ua.last_login_at, ua.created_at, ua.updated_at, GROUP_CONCAT(urr.role_code ORDER BY urr.role_code SEPARATOR ',') AS role_codes FROM user_account ua JOIN user_wechat_auth uwa ON uwa.user_id = ua.id LEFT JOIN user_role_relation urr ON urr.user_id = ua.id AND urr.status = 'ACTIVE' WHERE uwa.openid = #{openid} GROUP BY ua.id LIMIT 1

SELECT ua.id, ua.user_no, ua.nickname, ua.avatar_url, ua.mobile, ua.gender, ua.status, ua.register_source, ua.invitation_code_used, ua.last_login_at, ua.created_at, ua.updated_at, GROUP_CONCAT(urr.role_code ORDER BY urr.role_code SEPARATOR ',') AS role_codes FROM user_account ua LEFT JOIN user_role_relation urr ON urr.user_id = ua.id AND urr.status = 'ACTIVE' WHERE ua.id = #{userId} GROUP BY ua.id LIMIT 1
SELECT id FROM artist_profile WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' LIMIT 1
SELECT id FROM distributor_profile WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_account (user_no, nickname, avatar_url, gender, status, register_source, invitation_code_used, last_login_at) VALUES (#{userNo}, #{nickname}, #{avatarUrl}, #{gender}, #{status}, #{registerSource}, #{invitationCodeUsed}, #{lastLoginAt})
INSERT INTO user_wechat_auth (user_id, openid, unionid, session_key, app_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{openid}, #{unionid}, #{sessionKey}, #{appId})
INSERT IGNORE INTO user_role_relation (user_id, role_code, is_default, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{roleCode}, 1, 'ACTIVE')
mapper.update: UPDATE user_account SET nickname = #{nickname}, avatar_url = #{avatarUrl}, gender = COALESCE(#{gender}, gender), last_login_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{userId}
UPDATE user_wechat_auth SET session_key = #{sessionKey}, unionid = #{unionid}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
